product_overview: A static landing page about effective learning techniques, presented with HTML and modular CSS.
core_goals: Provide structured content using cards, sections, and external links
Demonstrate static front-end layout and responsive design

features.name: Header and Navigation
features.description: Displays top branding, title, subtitle, and CTA navigation link.
user_flows: Open homepage -> View header elements -> Click CTA to jump to techniques section

features.name: Techniques Section
features.description: Presents learning techniques in card format with images and descriptions.
user_flows: Scroll to techniques section -> Review each card's title and description
